# Opedd — Programmatic Content Licensing Infrastructure

> Opedd is the licensing infrastructure for the AI age. Publishers set prices, issue verifiable license keys, and get paid automatically. AI labs discover, purchase, and verify content licenses via API.

## Core API Endpoints

- [License Discovery](https://djdzcciayennqchjgybx.supabase.co/functions/v1/license-discovery): Machine-readable licensing manifest (opedd.json format)
- [Agent Purchase](https://djdzcciayennqchjgybx.supabase.co/functions/v1/agent-purchase): Autonomous license purchase with Stripe or USDC payment
- [Verify License](https://djdzcciayennqchjgybx.supabase.co/functions/v1/verify-license): Verify any license key with on-chain proof
- [Lookup Article](https://djdzcciayennqchjgybx.supabase.co/functions/v1/lookup-article): Resolve article pricing by URL
- [Registry](https://djdzcciayennqchjgybx.supabase.co/functions/v1/registry): Public registry of all issued licenses
- [Content Delivery](https://djdzcciayennqchjgybx.supabase.co/functions/v1/content-delivery): Access full article content with bearer token
- [Enterprise License](https://djdzcciayennqchjgybx.supabase.co/functions/v1/enterprise-license): Bulk catalog licensing for AI labs
- [Publisher Directory](https://djdzcciayennqchjgybx.supabase.co/functions/v1/publisher-directory): Browse all available publishers

## License Types

- **Human**: Editorial reuse, republication, citations
- **AI Training**: Training or fine-tuning language models
- **AI Inference**: RAG, retrieval, summarization, real-time AI outputs
- **Archive**: Full publisher catalog access (annual subscription)

## Payment Methods

- Stripe (Card, ACH/US bank account)
- USDC on Tempo blockchain

## On-Chain Verification

Every license is registered on the Tempo blockchain (OpeddRegistry.sol). Verify at: https://explore.tempo.xyz

## Quick Start (3 API calls)

1. Discover: GET /license-discovery?publisher_id={id}
2. Purchase: POST /agent-purchase { article_id, license_type, buyer_email, payment }
3. Verify: GET /verify-license?key={license_key}

## Documentation

- Website: https://opedd.com
- For AI Agents: https://opedd.com/for-ai-agents
- Pricing: https://opedd.com/pricing
